mapper.sql: ( IFNULL(( SELECT fr.lesson_fee FROM pt_coach_fee_rule fr WHERE fr.coach_id = a.coach_id AND fr.rule_type = 1 AND fr.status = 1 AND fr.product_id IN (a.product_id, 0) AND fr.store_id IN (a.store_id, 0) AND (fr.effective_time IS NULL OR fr.effective_time <= NOW()) ORDER BY (fr.product_id = a.product_id) DESC, (fr.store_id = a.store_id) DESC LIMIT 1 ), 0) * a.lesson_count )

a.appointment_status = 3 AND a.deleted = 0 AND o.deleted = 0 AND o.lesson_count > 0 AND a.finish_at >= #{beginDate} AND a.finish_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND a.store_id IN (${storeIds})
AND c.coach_name LIKE concat('%', #{coachName}, '%')
AND o.product_name LIKE concat('%', #{productName}, '%')
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(a.lesson_count), 0) AS totalLessons, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(), 0), 2) AS income, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(), 0), 2) AS cost, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(), 0) - IFNULL(SUM(), 0), 2) AS grossProfit, CASE WHEN IFNULL(SUM(), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( (IFNULL(SUM(), 0) - IFNULL(SUM(), 0)) / SUM() * 100, 2) END AS grossRate FROM pt_private_appointment a JOIN pt_private_order o ON o.id = a.order_id LEFT JOIN pt_coach c ON c.id = a.coach_id AND c.deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT a.store_id FROM pt_private_appointment a JOIN pt_private_order o ON o.id = a.order_id LEFT JOIN pt_coach c ON c.id = a.coach_id AND c.deleted = 0
GROUP BY a.store_id ) t

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT a.coach_id FROM pt_private_appointment a JOIN pt_private_order o ON o.id = a.order_id LEFT JOIN pt_coach c ON c.id = a.coach_id AND c.deleted = 0
GROUP BY a.coach_id ) t

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT a.product_id, o.product_name FROM pt_private_appointment a JOIN pt_private_order o ON o.id = a.order_id LEFT JOIN pt_coach c ON c.id = a.coach_id AND c.deleted = 0
GROUP BY a.product_id, o.product_name ) t
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pt_private_appointment a JOIN pt_private_order o ON o.id = a.order_id LEFT JOIN pt_coach c ON c.id = a.coach_id AND c.deleted = 0
mapper.sql:
a.appointment_status = 3 AND a.deleted = 0 AND o.deleted = 0 AND a.finish_at >= #{beginDate} AND a.finish_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND a.store_id IN (${storeIds})
AND c.coach_name LIKE concat('%', #{coachName}, '%')
AND o.product_name LIKE concat('%', #{productName}, '%')
AND ( s.storeId IS NULL OR c.id IS NULL OR fr.id IS NULL OR o.lesson_count <= 0 )

LEFT JOIN pt_coach_fee_rule fr ON fr.id = ( SELECT fx.id FROM pt_coach_fee_rule fx WHERE fx.coach_id = a.coach_id AND fx.rule_type = 1 AND fx.status = 1 AND fx.product_id IN (a.product_id, 0) AND fx.store_id IN (a.store_id, 0) AND (fx.effective_time IS NULL OR fx.effective_time <= NOW()) ORDER BY (fx.product_id = a.product_id) DESC, (fx.store_id = a.store_id) DESC LIMIT 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pt_private_appointment a JOIN pt_private_order o ON o.id = a.order_id LEFT JOIN pt_coach c ON c.id = a.coach_id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN store s ON s.storeId = a.store_id
